refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined productivity target by optimizing equipment operation and task execution efficiency.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and outcome-focused; refining it into sub-FRs clarifies specific functional aspects that contribute to productivity, enabling targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure productivity metrics (m³/h or ton/h) during representative operations and verify that sub-functions contribute to meeting or exceeding the target.
sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operational efficiency to maximize throughput.
FR2: Support effective task planning and execution to minimize idle time.
FR3: Provide real-time performance feedback to operators and tele-operators.

candidate_dps: DP1: Adaptive equipment control algorithms to maximize operational efficiency.
DP2: Integrated task scheduling and dispatch system.
DP3: Real-time telemetry and feedback interface.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Adaptive equipment control algorithms to maximize operational efficiency.

potential_sources: Interaction between control algorithms and task scheduling.
Data dependencies between telemetry feedback and control adjustments.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 is logically decoupled from task scheduling and telemetry feedback but requires well-defined interfaces to avoid tight coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate real-time data for control algorithms.
Risk that control algorithm complexity may increase integration difficulty.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing telemetry feedback separately to reduce coupling.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical control and operation of heavy equipment implementing adaptive control algorithms.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle sends operational data to Teleoperation and Safety Services.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives task commands from Teleoperation module.

module_containment_scores.notes: Broad scope, less focused containment for adaptive control.
High containment score due to direct control of equipment; low diffusion risk.
Limited containment relevance; mostly remote control and monitoring.
Minimal containment; focused on safety alerts.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Adaptive control algorithms are best contained within the Vehicle module to minimize diffusion and maintain clear ownership of physical control functions.
containment_risks: Potential integration complexity with Teleoperation for tasking commands.
Risk of interface mismatches on Telemetry data formats.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define strict interface contracts for Telemetry and Tasking to mitigate integration risks.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DP (adaptive control algorithms) directly addresses the refined FR of optimizing equipment operational efficiency.

diffusion_risks: Possible diffusion if control logic is partially implemented outside Vehicle module.
Interface complexity with Teleoperation and Safety Services.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows strong containment suitability for DP; interfaces are well-defined to limit diffusion.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by measuring productivity metrics and monitoring control algorithm performance within Vehicle.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of adaptive control DP to Vehicle IM with defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Enhance interface specifications for Telemetry and Tasking to ensure robust integration.
Consider future refinement of sub-FRs and corresponding DPs for task planning and feedback.

decision.justification: Current level of decomposition and assignment meets criteria with clear FR refinement, DP selection, and IM assignment with manageable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operational efficiency to maximize throughput.
FR2: Support effective task planning and execution to minimize idle time.
FR3: Provide real-time performance feedback to operators and tele-operators.

revise.why: Refine interface contracts to reduce integration risks and diffusion.

assumptions: Accurate real-time data availability for control algorithms.
Stable network links for Telemetry and Tasking interfaces.
open_risks: Integration complexity between Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.
Potential interface mismatches causing data loss or delays.
evidence_needed: Performance data from prototype Vehicle control algorithms.
Interface compliance test results between Vehicle and Teleoperation.
